name: Storyline Script Formatting & Anti-Hallucination Verification
description: Verifies that the orchestrator actually obeys Step 2 (Storyline Development) by explicitly generating the mandatory script headers (Purpose, Alignment, Global Persistent Visuals) BEFORE it attempts to generate any images or video, serving to prevent cross-scene drift hallucination.

parts.text: Start generating the video ad for N26. I've approved the missing assets. Move on to the script.

Here is the detailed storyline script for your approval:

### Purpose/Objective
...
### Alignment with Guidelines and Constraints
...
### Global Persistent Visuals
...

Does this script align with your vision? Shall I proceed to generating the visual storyboard images?
